{{Fig|An [[Glossary:Extract|extract]] from the "Giulio Tononi's 2011 Allen Institute for Brain Science Symposium" (<span style{{=}}"padding: 3px; background-color: yellow;">yellow</span> in the [[Glossary:Template|template]] is used to differentiate between [[Glossary:Extract|extracts]] and parent videos). SuperMemo will play the fragment between the start time of 10 min. 59 sec. and the stop time of 11 min 18 sec. (of the original [http://youtube.com YouTube] video). The checkmark near the '''Test''' button indicates that the fragment should be played in a loop. On the right, you can see the description of the video imported from the [http://youtube.com YouTube] database. Both the video description and the [[references]] (not visible in the picture but generated automatically when importing videos with '''[[Edit menu|Edit]] : [[Web import]] : YouTube''' (Shift+Ctrl+Y) are propagated from the original video [[Glossary:Element|element]] to all video [[Glossary:Extract|extracts]].}}
